title: Southern California backflow testing
description: Southern California support page for utility-first backflow routes across Pasadena, Orange County, the Inland Empire, and San Diego.
summary: This cluster matters commercially because some utilities publish official tester lists, others point users to county-certified tester directories or city portals, and the device expectations differ by irrigation, fire, and service-connection context. The metro page groups those routes without pretending Southern California is one authority.
